entity.label: Jalon
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Lodger, the last of the four sons of Ezra, of the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 4:17).

nodes.label: Jalon
nodes.description: Lodger, the last of the four sons of Ezra, of the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 4:17).

nodes.label: Mered
nodes.description: Rebellion, one of the sons of Ezra, of the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 4:17).

verses.text: And the sons of Ezra were, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.
